sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50004" key="i(ereu/simos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱερ-εύσιμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n50004.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fit for sacrifice</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.729d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
